name: Beatenberg paragliding in tandem from Interlaken
description: Discover Beatenberg paragliding in tandem from Interlaken in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Beatenberg paragliding in tandem from Interlaken in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Paragliding
subcategory.description: Book your next paragliding trip in Switzerland here. During a tandem flight you can admire incredible landscapes from a bird's eye view. Hotspots for paragliding are Interlaken, Central Switzerland and the Engadine. But also in Valais there are some breathtaking launch sites. After a few quick steps you are in the air and can enjoy the surroundings while your tandem pilot ensures a safe flight.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
